user.title: Tauron G13
user.description: Add the Tauron G13 tariff zone tracker. There is nothing to configure - zones are computed from the published G13 schedule and Polish public holidays.

abort.already_configured: Tauron G13 is already set up.

init.title: Timeline range
init.description: How far the `timeline` attribute (used by the dashboard strip) reaches around the current hour.
